docs.title: Dr. Byrd's Eye -  MedPhys Help
docs.text: Greetings! As a new physicists and professor, this website is meant to organize Medical Physics Educational content in a digestible way.

docs.title: IMRT Planning
docs.text: This section covers IMRT and VMAT treatment planning concepts, optimization strategies, plan evaluation, and practical clinical implementation.

docs.title: TG-51 Dosimetry
docs.text: This section covers reference dosimetry, ion chamber calibration, beam quality specification, and implementation of the AAPM TG-51 protocol.
